# rasuvaeff/yii3-outbox-db

Database-backed `StorageInterface` for `rasuvaeff/yii3-outbox` (yiisoft/db).

## Install

```bash
composer require rasuvaeff/yii3-outbox-db
```

## Rules

- `DbOutboxStorage implements Rasuvaeff\Yii3Outbox\StorageInterface`.
- `save()` upserts by `OutboxMessage::getId()` — the durable identity and the
  at-least-once dedup anchor; never regenerate it.
- `findPending(array $types = [], int $limit = 1000)`: `Pending` rows, optional
  type filter (empty = all), ordered by `created_at` ASC. Lets several consumers
  share one outbox.
- `markPublished`/`markFailed` re-save with the new status, preserving the
  attempt count / `last_attempt_at` of the passed message.
- Datetimes stored as `Y-m-d H:i:s` UTC strings.
- Corrupt rows → `InvalidOutboxRowException` (never silently coerced).
- Core `yii3-outbox` ships no `config/di.php`; this backend (or the app) is the
  single source of `StorageInterface`.

## API

```php
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3Outbox\Outbox;
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3Outbox\OutboxStatus;
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3OutboxDb\DbOutboxStorage;

$storage = new DbOutboxStorage(db: $connection, table: 'outbox');

$outbox = new Outbox(storage: $storage, clock: $clock);
$outbox->record(type: 'ab.exposure', payload: '{"experiment":"checkout"}');

$pending = $storage->findPending(types: ['ab.exposure'], limit: 1000);
$storage->markPublished($message);
$storage->markFailed($message);
$message = $storage->getById($id);          // ?OutboxMessage
$purged  = $storage->deleteByStatus(OutboxStatus::Published);
```

## Migration

```php
use M260611000000CreateOutboxTable;

(new M260611000000CreateOutboxTable())->up($migrationBuilder);          // table "outbox"
(new M260611000000CreateOutboxTable(table: 'my_outbox'))->up($builder); // custom name
```

Columns: `id` (PK), `type`, `payload`, `status`, `created_at`, `attempts`,
`last_attempt_at`, `aggregate_id`. Index `idx_outbox_status_type` backs the
pending poll.

## DI / params

```php
// config/params.php
'rasuvaeff/yii3-outbox-db' => ['table' => 'outbox'],
```

Binds `StorageInterface => DbOutboxStorage` from `config/di.php`.
